calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Pre;Iminary Injuction
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Rooney, Esq., 415-533-0282, appearing for Rose Court, Plaintiff.

Thomas Woods, Esq., 916-319-4748, appearing for Select Portfolio, for Defendant.

Argued. Mr. Rooney stated that he contested to the tentative ruling and provided oral arguement.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injuctionis DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show irreparable harm an likelihood of prevailing on the merits. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
